name: Spaghetti Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Green onion (or 1 small regular onion), diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
2. Drain the cooked pasta and rinse with cold water.
3. Cool the pasta completely.
4. Rinse the pasta again with cold water and drain well.
5. Add diced tomatoes, shredded cheese, cucumbers, green onions, green pepper, Salad Supreme, and Italian dressing to the pasta.
6. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt, pepper, or other desired seasonings as needed.
8. Adjust the mixture by adding more tomatoes, green onions, or any additional toppings like fresh basil and oregano if using.
9. Allow the salad to stand for at least 2 hours (or longer) before serving. This recipe can be prepared ahead of time and refrigerated overnight.
Optional: Add chopped ham for extra protein. Chopped ham is recommended for best results.
Note: The original recipe yields a large quantity, but it can easily be halved if needed.
